data.content: Plan complete. Root cause: readDynamicModels() returns [] for Claude/Codex/Gemini, leaving only a single provider-only fallback option. Fix: add static model catalogs for each provider in settings-agent-scan.ts, and add a clear button to SelectedModelPills in settings-agents-scanned.tsx. 5 steps: (1) static catalogs, (2) verify merge with configured model, (3) verify fallback path, (4) clear button UI, (5) tests. Medium complexity, ~100-150 lines across 2-3 files.
